title: Aircraft Mapping File
description: Maps simulator-specific aircraft identifiers to ICAO type designators and metadata.

schema_version.description: Schema version for forward compatibility. Current version: 1.

source.description: The simulator or platform this mapping file applies to.

description.description: Optional human-readable description of this mapping file.

source_id.description: The aircraft identifier as it appears in the simulator logbook. For X-Plane: the aircraft folder name or acf ICAO field. For MSFS: the AircraftTitle from CSV export. For FlightLogger: the aircraft type string from the export.

icao_type.description: ICAO type designator (e.g. C172, A320, B738). Must match a code in the ICAO aircraft type designator database.

display_name.description: Optional human-friendly name shown in the UI. If omitted, the name from the aircraft_types reference table is used.

addon_vendor.description: The third-party addon developer, if applicable. Null or omitted for default/stock aircraft.

tags.description: Optional tags for filtering and categorization.
